summary: Implemented and committed Phase 5 on `zvorygin/faction-phase-5` as `90ecf873`. Starting Steel/Oil and starting entities now resolve from Rust-authoritative faction catalog loadouts, replay artifacts record per-player `playerLoadouts[]` instead of one global start shim, replay launch validates matching loadout records, and `plans/faction/phase-5.md` is marked done.
verification: cargo test --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-sim loadout: passed
cargo run --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-archcheck -- check-sim-architecture: passed after trimming replay.rs test footprint
normal git commit hook full local CI: passed
gameplay_impact: Kriegsia's normal start is intended to be unchanged: City Centre, worker ring, existing Steel/Oil, Supply, and universal Steel/Oil map nodes. The fixture faction remains sim/test-only and starts with alternate Steel/Oil plus Depot and Scout Car; no real Ekaterina roster or faction-specific map resources were added.
next_executor_notes: Phase 6 can attach ability registry work to faction catalog definitions. Replay schema now requires `playerLoadouts[]` records matching each player faction; old schema-2 artifacts without loadout records are intentionally incompatible.
manual_test_notes: Later sanity check a normal Kriegsia match: initial base/workers, Steel/Oil/Supply HUD, gather/spend, training/building, and post-match replay startup.
